name: Gemini 3 Pro
summary: Gemini 3 Pro is Google’s highest-reasoning AI model, designed for research-grade tasks that require deep logical planning, long context understanding, and multimodal intelligence.
whyItMatters: Gemini 3 Pro represents Google’s move toward frontier-level, agent-capable intelligence. It enables complex scientific research, advanced software engineering, and long-horizon reasoning workflows that are not practical with lower-latency or consumer-optimized models.
capabilities: Long-context understanding for large documents and datasets
Multimodal input across text, images, and code
